en.extract:
The Kolombangara monarch (Symposiachrus browni), or Brown's monarch, is a species of bird in the family Monarchidae. It is endemic to Solomon Islands. Its natural habitat is subtropical or tropical moist lowland forests. It is threatened by habitat loss. It was formerly considered as conspecific with the Vella Lavella monarch.


Taxonomy and systematics
This species was originally placed in the genus Monarcha until moved to Symposiachrus in 2009.
Two subspecies are recognised:

S. b. browni (Ramsay, EP, 1883) – Kolombangara, New Georgia, Vangunu and satellites (east, south New Georgia group, central west Solomon Islands)
S. b. meeki (Rothschild & Hartert, EJO, 1905) – Rendova and Tetepare Islands (southwest New Georgia group, central west Solomon Islands)
The Vella Lavella monarch was formerly considered as a subspecies.

The '''Kolombangara monarch''' ('''''Symposiachrus browni'''''), or '''Brown's monarch''', is a species of [[bird]] in the family [[Monarchidae]]. It is [[Endemism|endemic]] to [[Solomon Islands]]. Its natural [[habitat]] is subtropical or tropical moist lowland [[forest]]s. It is threatened by [[habitat loss]]. It was formerly considered as [[conspecific]] with the [[Vella Lavella monarch]].

==Taxonomy and systematics==
This species was originally placed in the genus ''[[Monarcha]]'' until moved to ''Symposiachrus'' in 2009.<ref name=ioc/>

Two [[subspecies]] are recognised:<ref name=ioc>{{cite web| editor1-last=Gill | editor1-first=Frank | editor1-link=Frank Gill (ornithologist) | editor2-last=Donsker | editor2-first=David | editor3-last=Rasmussen | editor3-first=Pamela | editor3-link=Pamela C. Rasmussen | date=August 2024 | title=Monarchs | work=IOC World Bird List Version 14.2 | url=https://www.worldbirdnames.org/bow/monarchs/ | publisher=International Ornithologists' Union | access-date=20 September 2024 }}</ref>
* ''S. b. browni'' ([[Edward Pierson Ramsay|Ramsay, EP]], 1883) – [[Kolombangara]], [[New Georgia]], [[Vangunu]] and satellites (east, south [[New Georgia]] group, central west [[Solomon Islands]])
* ''S. b. meeki'' ([[Walter Rothschild, 2nd Baron Rothschild|Rothschild]] & [[Ernst Hartert|Hartert, EJO]], 1905) – [[Rendova Island|Rendova]] and [[Tetepare]] Islands (southwest [[New Georgia]] group, central west [[Solomon Islands]])

The [[Vella Lavella monarch]] was formerly considered as a subspecies.<ref name=ioc/>
